title: carpolyza tenella
intro: Carpolyza tenella, also known as Mexican tea, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Carpolyza tenella include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Carpolyza tenella include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
